title: Command Large Utility Hook, Pack of 1 Hook and 2 Adhesive Strips, White - Damage Free Hanging - Holds up to 2.2kg
features: STRONG AND VERSATILE: Command Utility Hooks hold strongly on a variety of indoor surfaces including painted walls, finished wood, glass, tile, metal, and other smooth surfaces, Great for hanging backpacks, curtain rods and banners
NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Hang your accessories where you want without nails or a hammer
DAMAGE-FREE DECORATING: Say goodbye to holes or sticky residue on your walls, Command Adhesive Strips by 3M are easy to use and help keep your walls looking beautiful without any marks

REMOVES CLEANLY: These hooks leave no sticky adhesive behind, Thanks to the Command stretch-release removable adhesive technology, they hold strongly yet you can remove them without leaving traces or glue residue
INCLUDES: The pack contains 1 white hook and 2 adhesive strips, holding 2.2kg, Not suitable for hanging picture frames
Pack contents: 1 hook and 2 large strips
